findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 34. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Officials' names duplicated as body text below page footer, disrupting reading order at the start of the document
findings.evidence: In the PDF, ROY COOPER/Governor, ELIZABETH S. BISER/Secretary, and KATHY B. RAWLS/Director appear only once, right-aligned in the letterhead header area. In the HTML, these names appear twice: once in the right-aligned header/letterhead area, and again as left-aligned body text below the page 1 footer ('State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries…'). A reader encounters the footer text mid-document and then sees the names repeated before reaching the FF-52-2023 proclamation content.
